metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4686
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig 5 shows localisation of TNK2 (ACK1) to both axon terminals and dendritic spines using DAB immunolocalization in mouse hippocampus, neocortex and cerebellum. As the molecule does not contain a transmembrane domain or membrane binding motif, its localisation is cytosolic.. Experimental description: M&M:" Adult mice (NMRI mice). "

"incubated with rabbit antibody to Ack1/Pyk1 (1:100) for 2 days at 4°C." "Two rabbit polyclonal antibodies (384 and 385) were generated using the GST fusion proteins corresponding to the proline-rich region (amino acids 502-1008) following standard protocols (Harlow, 1988)."
